SHARDS.Settings.panelDensity.name: Panel density
SHARDS.Settings.izirTransparency.name: Izir: transparent prices
SHARDS.Settings.izirTransparency.hint: Show every negative effect to players immediately instead of hiding it until it first triggers.
SHARDS.Settings.izirDcBase.name: Izir: temptation DC base
SHARDS.Settings.izirDcStep.name: Izir: temptation DC per level
SHARDS.Settings.izirDcStep.hint: How much the temptation DC rises for each immersion level past the first (default 3).
SHARDS.Settings.izirShowDc.name: Izir: show temptation DC
SHARDS.Settings.izirShowDc.hint: Who sees the DC on temptation check cards.
SHARDS.Settings.izirSuggestStreak.name: Izir: relief streak
SHARDS.Settings.izirSuggestStreak.hint: Consecutive successful temptation saves before the panel suggests suppressing a price.
SHARDS.Settings.izirSuggestions.name: Izir: GM suggestion chips
SHARDS.Settings.izirSuggestions.hint: Show non-binding suggestions after temptation rolls.
SHARDS.Settings.izirArtSwap.name: Izir: automatic art swaps
SHARDS.Settings.izirArtSwap.hint: Swap portrait and token art automatically at tier thresholds. Manual buttons always work.
SHARDS.Settings.izirTokenIcons.name: Izir: effect token icon
SHARDS.Settings.izirTokenIcons.hint: Show the Izir Immersion status icon on the token.
SHARDS.Izir.MarkSelectedHint: Mark the selected token(s) as Nameless.
SHARDS.Izir.MarkedNone: Select one or more tokens first.
SHARDS.Izir.MarkedAlready: Already tracked. Selected in the roster.
SHARDS.Izir.NoMarked: No Nameless tracked yet. Select a token and mark it.
SHARDS.Izir.UnmarkConfirm: Remove Izir tracking from {name}? Their immersion, history, and effects will be cleared.
SHARDS.Izir.SelectPrompt: Select a Nameless from the list.
SHARDS.Izir.TerminalNineveh: Consumed. This character became a Nineveh.
SHARDS.Izir.ResyncHint: Rebuild this actor's Izir items from scratch. Shift-click: every marked actor.
SHARDS.Izir.EffectsHint: Deleted Izir items come back on their own. To remove one, suppress it on the ladder.
SHARDS.Izir.ContentError: Izir content failed to load. The subsystem is disabled.
SHARDS.Izir.BadgeHint: The token badge shows this number; editing the badge changes the level too.
SHARDS.Izir.SlideLegend: Fail +1 · crit fail +2 · success holds · a full bar raises immersion (overflow carries) · click a segment or use − / + to set any value
SHARDS.Izir.TenthReady: {name}: the bar is full. The Tenth Step awaits.
SHARDS.Izir.TemptationReasonHint: reason, e.g. tempted to finish a downed foe
SHARDS.Izir.SubjugatedNote: Subjugated: Izir no longer forces temptations. Roll one manually if the story calls for it.
SHARDS.Izir.NoWill: This actor has no Will save to roll.
SHARDS.Izir.SurgeText: The black rushes up behind your eyes. For a heartbeat, you are not the one in control.
SHARDS.Izir.RemindText: Izir is patient. It remembers what you owe.
SHARDS.Izir.RechargeDesc: {name} is spent. Available again in {rounds} round(s).
SHARDS.Izir.TerrorPrompt: {target} is caught in {bearer}'s terror aura. Roll the Will save below; frightened 1 applies on a failure, frightened 2 on a critical failure.
SHARDS.Izir.TerrorImmuneDesc: You have already faced this terror; you are immune to it for 1 minute.
SHARDS.Izir.ForkPrompt: {name} stands at full immersion. Izir will not share the vessel forever. Decide their fate.
SHARDS.Izir.ForkWarn: This is terminal and locks the tracker. Choose carefully.
SHARDS.Izir.GuidanceNineveh: The character is lost to Izir and becomes a Nineveh, an NPC monster. Rebuild them as an NPC statblock. All powers and prices are stripped down to the terminal marker.
SHARDS.Izir.GuidanceSubjugated: The character has mastered Izir. Every price is suppressed by default (reason: subjugation). Restore any residual scars you want to keep on the ladder. The Sovereign Will capstone is now active.
SHARDS.Izir.ArtHint: Set portrait and token art per tier threshold. Art swaps automatically as immersion crosses 4, 7, and 10 (if enabled), or apply it manually here.
SHARDS.Izir.ArtNone: No art configured for this threshold.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcBase.name: Ansu: release DC base
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcBase.hint: Base of the Release save DC: base + step × min(attunement, cap). Default 20 → DC 22..30.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcStep.name: Ansu: release DC per level
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcStep.hint: How much the Release DC rises per attunement level until the cap (default 2).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcCap.name: Ansu: release DC freeze level
SHARDS.Settings.ansuDcCap.hint: Attunement level after which the Release DC stops rising (default 5 → DC 22..30, then flat).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuCallBase.name: Ansu: call DC base
SHARDS.Settings.ansuCallBase.hint: Base of the Call check DC: base + step × attunement, with no cap (default 20 → DC 22..38).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuCallStep.name: Ansu: call DC per level
SHARDS.Settings.ansuCallStep.hint: How much the Call DC rises per attunement level, uncapped (default 2).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuShowDc.name: Ansu: show release DC
SHARDS.Settings.ansuShowDc.hint: Who sees the DC on Release save cards.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuClimbBase.name: Ansu: climb bar base
SHARDS.Settings.ansuClimbBase.hint: Points needed to rise: base + step × attunement (default 2 + 1×N).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuClimbStep.name: Ansu: climb bar per level
SHARDS.Settings.ansuClimbStep.hint: How much the climb bar grows per attunement level (default 1).
SHARDS.Settings.ansuSuggestions.name: Ansu: GM suggestion chips
SHARDS.Settings.ansuSuggestions.hint: Show non-binding suggestions after release rolls.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuArtSwap.name: Ansu: automatic art swaps
SHARDS.Settings.ansuArtSwap.hint: Swap portrait and token art automatically at tier thresholds (the horn stages). Manual buttons always work.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuTokenIcons.name: Ansu: effect token icons
SHARDS.Settings.ansuTokenIcons.hint: Show the Attunement / Communion status icons on the token.
SHARDS.Settings.ansuMarker.name: Ansu: attunement marker on actor
SHARDS.Settings.ansuMarker.hint: Keep the persistent Attunement effect (with the two-way level badge) on attuned actors. Turn off to track the level from the panel only: no marker hangs on the character.
SHARDS.Ansu.MarkSelectedHint: Attune the selected token(s) to an Ansu.
SHARDS.Ansu.MarkedNone: Select one or more tokens first.
SHARDS.Ansu.MarkedAlready: Already tracked. Selected in the roster.
SHARDS.Ansu.NoMarked: No Ansu-bearers tracked yet. Select a token and attune it.
SHARDS.Ansu.DualIzir: Also tracked by Izir: independent track, switch tabs to see it.
SHARDS.Ansu.UnmarkConfirm: Remove Ansu tracking from {name}? Their attunement, history, and effects will be cleared.
SHARDS.Ansu.SelectPrompt: Select an Ansu-bearer from the list.
SHARDS.Ansu.TerminalTaken: Taken. The Ansu wins the body forever: this character is an NPC now, every boon permanently active.
SHARDS.Ansu.TerminalSubjugated: Mastery. The Ansu is subjugated: permanent Communion, no saves, the capstone is unlocked.
SHARDS.Ansu.MarkerSummary: Communion lasts {duration}; ending it takes a Will save against DC {dc}.
SHARDS.Ansu.Mode.lingering: Lingering: the Ansu doesn't let go
SHARDS.Ansu.Mode.seized: Seized: the Ansu has the body
SHARDS.Ansu.Mode.taken: Taken: the Ansu has the body
SHARDS.Ansu.ResyncHint: Rebuild this actor's Ansu items from scratch. Shift-click: every attuned actor.
SHARDS.Ansu.EffectsHint: Deleted Ansu items come back on their own. To remove one, suppress it on the ladder.
SHARDS.Ansu.ContentError: Ansu content failed to load. The subsystem is disabled.
SHARDS.Ansu.BadgeHint: The token badge shows this number; editing the badge changes the level too.
SHARDS.Ansu.ClimbLegend: Clean release +1 · critical success +2 · failure holds · a full bar raises attunement (overflow carries) · click a segment or use − / + to set any value
SHARDS.Ansu.TenthReady: {name}: the bar is full. The tenth step awaits: Mastery or Taken.
SHARDS.Ansu.InvokeCallHint: Posts the Call: an Intimidation check against the Call DC (base + step × attunement, uncapped). The power answers strength, not habit.
SHARDS.Ansu.ForceInvokeHint: GM override: begin Communion without the Call check.
SHARDS.Ansu.CallCardTitle: Show the Ansu you are worth answering
SHARDS.Ansu.CallFlavor: The power is never owed. It answers strength.
SHARDS.Ansu.NoIntimidation: This actor has no Intimidation to roll.
SHARDS.Ansu.CallCritReport: {name}: critical success on the Call: the Ansu answers eagerly. Communion begins; +1 to the Climb.
SHARDS.Ansu.CallFailReport: {name}: the Ansu does not deign. The action is spent; another attempt is allowed.
SHARDS.Ansu.CallCritFailReport: {name}: critical failure: the Ansu comes ANYWAY. Seizure for 1 round (play the body), then Communion continues under the player.
SHARDS.Ansu.ReleaseHint: Post the Release save: ending Communion takes a successful Will save.
SHARDS.Ansu.RoundsHint: The countdown runs on the Communion effect; a Release save posts automatically on expiry.
SHARDS.Ansu.EndNoSaveHint: GM override: end Communion cleanly without a save (no Climb progress).
SHARDS.Ansu.SeizeHint: GM override: snapshot the current state and apply full Communion at attunement 10: the Ansu plays the body. Works at any attunement.
SHARDS.Ansu.SeizeReturnHint: Restore the exact pre-seizure state (level, climb, communion: everything).
SHARDS.Ansu.NoAttunement: Attunement 0: there is nothing to invoke yet.
SHARDS.Ansu.ExpiryReason: Communion expired: the Ansu tests the grip.
SHARDS.Ansu.LingerReason: Lingering: the wrestle continues at turn's end.
SHARDS.Ansu.ReleaseCardTitle: The Ansu doesn't want to go
SHARDS.Ansu.ReleaseReasonHint: context, e.g. combat ended, the bearer eases their grip
SHARDS.Ansu.NoWill: This actor has no Will save to roll.
SHARDS.Ansu.UrgeText: The old strength leans on your hands. It has its own opinion about what happens next.
SHARDS.Ansu.Chip.seized: Seizure: play the body for a round
SHARDS.Ansu.RefusesUsed: {name}: the Ansu refuses. Set HP to 1, resolve the retaliation Strike, wounded increased by 1 (applied). Cooldown: 10 minutes.
SHARDS.Ansu.CooldownRunning: {name} is still recovering: about {minutes} minute(s) left.
SHARDS.Ansu.SeizureStart: {name}: the Ansu takes hold. Full Communion applied: the GM plays the body until Return is pressed.
SHARDS.Ansu.SeizureAutoStart: {name}: critical failure: the Ansu seizes the body for 1 round, then Lingering resumes.
SHARDS.Ansu.ForkPrompt: {name} stands at full attunement. Two ends were always possible: the murkhor masters the Ansu, or the Ansu takes the vessel. Decide.
SHARDS.Ansu.ForkWarn: This is terminal and locks the tracker. Choose carefully.
SHARDS.Ansu.GuidanceSubjugated: The character has mastered the Ansu: permanent Communion, no Release saves, Hand of the Ansu unlocked. Communion toggles as a free action from the panel or sheet.
SHARDS.Ansu.GuidanceTaken: The Ansu wins the body. The character becomes an NPC under GM control with every boon permanently active. Consider new art and a fresh NPC statblock.
SHARDS.Ansu.TakenConfirm: Declare the Ansu victorious over {name}? This is permanent: the character becomes a GM-run NPC with every boon active. The Ansu doesn't have to wait for attunement 10.
SHARDS.Ansu.TakenHint: Permanent: the Ansu wins the body at ANY attunement (confirm dialog).
SHARDS.Ansu.Log.refuses: The Ansu refused ({id}): wounded +1, cooldown {minutes} min
SHARDS.Ansu.Log.seizureOn: Seizure: the Ansu takes the body
SHARDS.Ansu.ArtHint: Set portrait and token art per tier threshold: the horn stages. Art swaps automatically as attunement crosses 4, 7, and 10 (if enabled), or apply it manually here.
SHARDS.Ansu.ArtNone: No art configured for this threshold.
